title: Smartphone Video Scene AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable smartphone video scene with smartphone video scene with vertical creator framing, believable interface zones, and clear action moment. Vertical 9:16 realistic smartphone footage at night. A fluffy West Highland White Terrier stands beside a parked electric motorbike on a quiet city street. The motorbike alarm suddenly goes off, flashing lights and beeping rhythmically. Realistic fur movement, natural night lighting, flashing alarm lights, slight motion blur, authentic viral pet video vibe. Main Action: small white terrier dancing excitedly beside a parked motorbike alarm. Animal Or. Subject: West Highland Terrier with fluffy fur and playful paw steps. Street Prop: parked scooter with blinking alarm light and phone visible in the rider mount. Phone Camera Style: vertical handheld smartphone footage, realistic compression, slight shake. Night Lighting: streetlamp glow, shop sign reflections, and dark pavement highlights. Loop Moment: dog bounces in rhythm when the alarm chirps, then looks at the camera. Subject: Make small white terrier dancing excitedly beside a parked motorbike alarm the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in vertical nighttime street setting with scooter, alarm light, storefront reflections, and handheld phone realism. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use vertical handheld smartphone footage, realistic compression, slight shake. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in realistic phone video look with mild compression, practical street lighting, motion blur, and authentic night color. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use warm streetlamp glow, blue shop LEDs, dark pavement, and small flashing alarm accents. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Smartphone Video Scene Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable smartphone video scene with smartphone video scene with vertical creator framing, believable interface zones, and clear action moment. Vertical 9:16 realistic smartphone footage at night. A fluffy West Highland White Terrier stands beside a parked electric motorbike on a quiet city street. The motorbike alarm suddenly goes off, flashing lights and beeping rhythmically. Realistic fur movement, natural night lighting, flashing alarm lights, slight motion blur, authentic viral pet video vibe. Main Action: tiny delivery robot spinning beside an e-bike with a beeping security alarm. Animal Or. Subject: round white robot mascot with blinking eyes and little wheel kicks. Street Prop: locked e-bike, curbside storefront, and flashing red alarm indicator. Phone Camera Style: 9:16 candid phone video with autofocus shifts and mild motion blur. Night Lighting: blue shop LEDs, warm streetlights, and wet sidewalk reflections. Loop Moment: robot spins twice, pauses on the beep, and gives a small wave. Subject: Make tiny delivery robot spinning beside an e-bike with a beeping security alarm the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in vertical nighttime street setting with scooter, alarm light, storefront reflections, and handheld phone realism. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use 9:16 candid phone video with autofocus shifts and mild motion blur. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use warm streetlamp glow, blue shop LEDs, dark pavement, and small flashing alarm accents.
